# Ziggers

> The Operating System for On-Ground Gig Work

Ziggers is an on-demand workforce booking and tracking platform that matches businesses with background-verified gig workers (including event helpers, catering boys, and delivery riders) within 15 minutes.

## Core Features
- **Live GPS Footprints**: Real-time tracking of matched workers during active shifts.
- **Secure Escrows**: Payments are locked beforehand and released only upon verified proof of work.
- **Proof of Work**: Anti-tamper, geofenced photographs uploaded on-site by workers.
- **10-Min Backfill Net**: Automated standby backup dispatch if a worker defaults or falls sick.

## Navigation & Pages

- [/](https://ziggers.in/): Core landing page with waitlist sign-up, app preview, and features list.
- [#blog](https://ziggers.in/#blog): The Ziggers knowledge base with operational guides and staffing insights.
- [#privacy](https://ziggers.in/#privacy): The privacy notice covering location collection and account options.
- [#terms](https://ziggers.in/#terms): The terms of service specifying worker codes and employer obligations.

## Chennai Catering Staff Guides (SEO/AEO/GEO)

- [#blog-post/hire-catering-boys-chennai](https://ziggers.in/#blog-post/hire-catering-boys-chennai): Complete guide to hiring verified catering boys and workers in Chennai (ECR, OMR, Mylapore). Covers hourly rates (₹600 - ₹1,200), KYC Aadhaar verification, and staffing compliance.
- [#blog-post/solving-no-show-catering-chennai](https://ziggers.in/#blog-post/solving-no-show-catering-chennai): Analysis of the wedding caterer no-show problem in T. Nagar halls and how GPS footprints combined with 10-minute standby dispatch guarantee execution.
- [#blog-post/wedding-catering-boys-chennai](https://ziggers.in/#blog-post/wedding-catering-boys-chennai): Scaling catering workers during peak Muhurtham season rush (Chithirai, Vaigasi, Aani) by utilizing lock-and-release escrow accounts to attract premium staff.
